title: arctium eriophorum
intro: Arctium eriophorum, also known as woolly thistle or downy burdock, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and polyphenols. The medicinal properties of Arctium eriophorum have been found to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting cancer cells, and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
